case_title: GREGORIO S. YUNZA VS. JULIET WHITEHORN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY YUNZA, GREGORIO S. AS TO DEFENDANT WHITEHORN, JULIET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED JUN-19-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITEHORN, JULIET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-09-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF GERGORIO S. YUNZAL IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS IRMA CHINGCUANGCO. DEFENDANT JULIET WHITEHORN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUNZA, GREGORIO S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITEHORN, JULIET $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $630.00, PLAINTIFF AND WITNESS IRMA CHINGCUANGCO PROVIDED BOTH TESTIMONY AND TEXT MESSAGES THAT CONFIRM DEFENDANT TOOK $600 FROM PLAINTIFF ON A LOAN AND WAS TO REPAY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
